raw_intent: Build, test, and deploy the complete STRIKE-POINT pipeline so that a pump prompt sent from NATRIX's iPhone via FirstStrike app arrives in NCL/mandate-generation/input/ as a structured JSON file, triggering mandate generation. Three-phase rollout: working → reliable → fast.

market_signals.title: Federal Reserve Leadership Transition Creates Policy Uncertainty
market_signals.description: Jerome Powell officially steps down after 8 years as Fed Chair, with Kevin Warsh incoming. Market showing 32% chance of rate hikes in 2026 per Polymarket, suggesting significant policy shift expectations under new leadership.
market_signals.action: Monitor incoming Fed policy signals and position for potential rate environment changes affecting energy/commodities exposure

market_signals.title: US-Iran Conflict Escalation Driving Energy Price Surge
market_signals.description: Oil hits $105.50/bbl on renewed US-Iran combat fears. Defense officials preparing target banks for possible resumption of combat operations as early as next week. Energy Secretary Wright claims US could easily double natural gas exports.
market_signals.action: Consider energy sector positioning and supply chain risk assessment for NARTIX operations

market_signals.title: Major Market Volatility with $900B Equity Wipeout
market_signals.description: Massive market selloff removes $900B from US stock market in single day. Treasury yields climbing (10Y to 4.58%, 5Y to 4.25%) as geopolitical tensions create risk-off sentiment despite Trump claiming deals with China.
market_signals.action: Review portfolio risk exposure and consider volatility hedging strategies
